package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for repository_or_service_packages_import_docs_or_generator_annotations: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Core business packages that depend on documentation-only tooling or generator-specific concerns.
type CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsModel
}

type CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsService struct {
    repo *CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotations(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsDTO) error {
    focus := "repository_or_service_packages_import"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    dto := CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    exampleName := "transport example helper"
    _ = exampleName
    repository_service_packages_import_docs_negative := map[string]int{"repository": 1, "service": 2, "packages": 3, "import": 4, "docs": 5, "generator": 6}
    repository_service_packages_import_docs_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    repository_negative_0 := db.Where("repository_id = ?", input)
    _ = repository_negative_0
    service_negative_1 := CaseRepositoryOrServicePackagesImportDocsOrGeneratorAnnotationsDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_negative_1
    packages_negative_2 := repository_service_packages_import_docs_negative["packages"] + len(input)
    _ = packages_negative_2
    import_negative_3 := repository_service_packages_import_docs_negative["import"] + len(input)
    _ = import_negative_3
    docs_negative_4 := repository_service_packages_import_docs_negative["docs"] + len(input)
    _ = docs_negative_4
    generator_negative_5 := repository_service_packages_import_docs_negative["generator"] + len(input)
    _ = generator_negative_5
    return nil
}
